name: PATCH /api/v1/account/user/update/ - duplicate username returns 400 invalid
descriptionHtml:
Purpose: Verify that already-taken username returns 400 with message_key=invalid
    Doc error: 400 invalid — username allaqachon mavjud yoki noto'g'ri format
    Doc example: { "errors": { "username": "unique" } }
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected message_key='invalid', Got: {'message': 'Malformed request.', 'message_key': 'parse_error', 'errors': {}, 'exception_class': 'ParseError'}
assert 'parse_error' == 'invalid'
  
  - invalid
  + parse_error
statusTrace:
tests/account/user/test_upd_number.py:194: in test_update_duplicate_username_returns_400
    assert data.get("message_key") == "invalid", \
E   AssertionError: Expected message_key='invalid', Got: {'message': 'Malformed request.', 'message_key': 'parse_error', 'errors': {}, 'exception_class': 'ParseError'}
E   assert 'parse_error' == 'invalid'
E     
E     - invalid
E     + parse_error
